name: 5dim_equipment
title: 5Dim's mod - Equipment
author: 5Dim
description:
Equipment module for 5Dim's mod
Enhance your power armor with upgraded equipment
This mod includes:
- 10 tiers of batteries
- 10 tiers of exoskeletons
- 10 tiers of personal roboports
- 10 tiers of personal laser defense
- 10 tiers of personal tesla defense
- 10 tiers of portable solar panels
- 10 tiers of fission reactors
- 10 tiers of energy shields
- Upgraded night vision equipment
- New power armor variants
